records.question: Which albums by hippocampe fou were released in 2015 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT torrents.id FROM torrents
WHERE torrents.groupyear >= 2015 AND torrents.releasetype = 'album' AND torrents.artist = 'hippocampe fou'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM torrents AS T1 WHERE T1.artist = 'hippocampe fou' AND T1.groupYear >= 2015 AND T1.releaseType = 'Album'
